input.prompt: Photorealistic cinematic footage of a distinguished colonial gentleman delivering an impassioned speech at a wooden podium in a grand hall.

identity_blocks.name: Benjamin Franklin
identity_blocks.identity: Caucasian, fair ruddy skin, male, 70, receding gray hair thin on top with longer gray sides, round spectacles perched on nose, blue-gray eyes, 5 feet 10 inches, 220 lbs, portly statesman build, cream linen shirt with ruffled cravat
identity_blocks.motion: Standing at podium, gesturing emphatically with right hand raised, left hand gripping podium edge

scene_context.scene_description: Interior of Independence Hall, warm afternoon light streaming through tall windows, wooden furnishings, papers scattered on desks
scene_context.dialogue_cue: We must indeed all hang together, or most assuredly we shall all hang separately.
scene_context.negative_prompt: 3D character render, cartoon, anime, CGI, plastic skin, doll-like, mannequin, video game
